//: Lighthouse CI config for the served Flutter Web build. Run via `lhci autorun`.
The build is served with Brotli/gzip precompression (http-server --brotli --gzip)
so measured transfer sizes and timings reflect a correctly-configured production
server, not the current uncompressed one (see docs/web-performance.md).
Form factor is DESKTOP: Parcello targets desktop + Steam Deck (Chromium), and
CanvasKit Flutter Web cannot realistically hit Performance 90 under mobile throttling.
the five assertions below are WARN, not error - lhci autorun exits 0 on a
warn-only breach, so Lighthouse does not fail the workflow while run-to-run
variance is characterized. The deterministic Brotli size gate
(tool/size_budget.sh) is the only blocking check on this workflow for now.
TODO(web-perf-calibration): promote every line below from "warn" to
"error" once dozens of consecutive green runs support fixed thresholds -
do not remove this comment until that promotion happens.
